title: Executive Support Manager |PFG-B01
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

  • Manage Complex Calendars and Schedules: Efficiently organize and prioritize the executive's time, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and resolving conflicts
  • Coordinate Travel and Logistics: Plan and manage all business travel arrangements (flights, accommodation, ground transport, itineraries) and associated expense reporting
  • Manage Communication: Serve as the primary liaison between the executive and internal/external stakeholders, screening and responding to communications (emails, calls) on their behalf when appropriate
  • Prepare Documents and Reports: Draft, edit, and proofread correspondence, presentations, and reports, ensuring accuracy and professionalism
  • Oversee Meetings and Events: Coordinate all aspects of meetings, from scheduling and preparing agendas/materials to recording minutes and tracking action items
  • Handle Confidential Information: Exercise a high level of discretion and integrity when managing sensitive and confidential data and records
  • Lead and Mentor the Support Team: Manage and develop the executive support team, standardizing expectations and ensuring high performance
  • Manage Special Projects and Initiatives: Take the lead on ad-hoc projects, track progress on strategic initiatives, and ensure successful completion
  • Streamline Office Operations: Review and improve current administrative and operational processes to enhance overall efficiency and productivity
  • Anticipate Needs and Problem-Solve: Proactively foresee executive needs and resolve issues with a problem-solving mindset, ensuring the executive can focus on core leadership responsibilities

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Minimum Diploma and above
  • Exceptional organizational and time management skills
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and calendar management software
  • Discretion and professionalism in handling confidential information

EA License Number: 25C2980

Disclaimer:

By applying, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data for recruitment purposes in accordance with Singapore’s PDPA. Your application may be considered for this and other suitable roles.

postedCompany.description:
McKin Talent Solutions is a trusted provider of end-to-end talent solutions, offering expertise in payroll outsourcing, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), and comprehensive HR support to help businesses streamline their workforce management. We specialise in managing the entire recruitment process from talent sourcing and screening to onboarding, ensuring efficiency, compliance, and quality hires. Our services extend to executive search, contract staffing, talent acquisition, and HR consultancy, providing strategic advice to optimise human capital and enhance organisational performance. With a focus on accuracy and compliance, our payroll outsourcing solutions allow companies to save time, reduce administrative burden, and focus on their core business. We also provide flexible workforce arrangements to meet seasonal, project-based, or specialised staffing needs, making us the ideal partner for businesses seeking agile talent solutions. 


At McKin Talent Solutions, we prioritise understanding each client’s unique requirements, tailoring solutions that align with their goals and industry demands. Our commitment to professionalism, transparency, and results has earned us the trust of businesses across industries, while our people-first approach ensures both employers and candidates benefit from long-term, mutually rewarding relationships. Whether you require ongoing recruitment support, a one-off hiring project, or a complete outsourcing of your recruitment function, McKin Talent Solutions delivers solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and sustainable success.
postedCompany.name: MCKIN TALENT SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
